auth.access_denied: ❌ Sorry, you don't have access permission.
auth.contact_admin: If you have any questions, please contact the administrator.

help.title: 🤖 **Web3 Daily Digest User Guide**
help.feature_1: • 🎯 AI Personalization - Precise filtering based on your preferences
help.feature_2: • 💬 Conversational Setup - Complete preference collection in 3 rounds
help.feature_3: • 📊 Value Visibility - Shows how much time you've saved
help.feature_4: • 🔄 Continuous Learning - Optimizes based on your feedback
help.feedback_1: • Click 👍/👎 at the bottom of the digest
help.feedback_2: • Mark individual items as "Not interested" or "Very useful"
help.contact_admin: If you have any questions, please contact the administrator.

profile.title: 📝 **Your Current Preference Profile:**
profile.no_profile: ⚠️ You haven't set preferences yet, starting setup...
profile.load_failed: ❌ Failed to load, please try again later

settings.select_item: Please select a setting to modify:

sources.click_to_migrate: Click the "Migrate New Sources" button below to add
sources.tip_1: • Preset sources are carefully selected by the system for quality assurance
sources.tip_2: • You can add Twitter accounts and website RSS feeds you follow
sources.tip_3: • Click "Help" to learn how to add custom sources

push_time.title: ⏰ **Push Time Settings**
push_time.select_time: Please select your daily push time:
push_time.hint_1: • Select a preset time, or click "Custom" to enter a specific time
push_time.custom_input: Please enter push time in format: HH:MM
push_time.time_saved_desc: Your daily digest will be pushed at this time.
push_time.set_failed: ❌ Failed to set, please try again
push_time.format_error_desc: Please enter correct time format: HH:MM

stats.title: 📊 **Your Usage Statistics**
stats.hint: 💡 Keep using and providing feedback, AI will understand your preferences better!

feedback.reason_optional:
💬 Optional: Tell us specifically what needs improvement?
(You can skip and save feedback directly)
feedback.reason_required: 📝 Please tell us specifically what needs improvement:
feedback.supplement: 💬 If you need to add more details, please send a text message. Or reply /start to return to the main menu.
feedback.save_failed: ❌ Failed to save, please try again
feedback.process_failed: ❌ Failed to process, please try again
feedback.item_reduce: 💡 We will reduce similar content recommendations and work to find information that interests you more~
feedback.item_supplement: 💬 If you need to add more details, please send us a text message anytime~
feedback.item_thanks: 🎯 Thank you for your detailed feedback! AI will learn your preferences to make recommendations more accurate~
feedback.item_liked: 🌟 Great! Marked as useful, we will recommend more similar content~
feedback.positive_thanks: ✅ Thank you for your satisfaction! We will continue to provide quality content.
feedback.positive_thanks_generic: ✅ Thank you for the feedback! We will continue to provide quality content
feedback.negative_recorded: 📝 Recorded! We will improve content recommendations
feedback.ai_learning: 💡 AI is learning your preferences, future recommendations will be more accurate!

main_menu.welcome: 🎉 Welcome back! I'm your Web3 information assistant.

test.no_profile: ⚠️ Please use /start to set your preferences first

messages.use_start: Please use /start to begin, or use /help to view help

admin.title: 🔐 **Administrator Panel**
admin.select_function: Please select a function to manage:
admin.whitelist_empty: Whitelist is empty (all users can access)

sources_help.title: 📖 **How to Add Custom Information Sources?**
sources_help.twitter_step2_3: • System will automatically verify and add
sources_help.website_examples:
• CoinDesk:
  https://www.coindesk.com/arc/outboundfeeds/rss/

• Cointelegraph:
  https://cointelegraph.com/rss

• Decrypt:
  https://decrypt.co/feed

• ChainFeeds:
  https://www.chainfeeds.me/rss
sources_help.website_method2_1: • Visit website, look for RSS icon 📡
sources_help.faq_q1: **Q: How long until it takes effect?**
sources_help.faq_a1: A: Immediately, next digest will include new source content
sources_help.faq_q2: **Q: How many custom sources can I add?**
sources_help.faq_a2: A: No limit, but recommend not more than 20
sources_help.faq_a3: A: Go to "My Custom Sources", click delete button
sources_help.faq_q4: **Q: Why do some sources fail verification?**
sources_help.hint: 💡 **Hint**: System will automatically verify RSS source quality and timeliness to ensure the latest, most relevant information for you!

migration.success_desc: Added {count} new information sources for you:
migration.no_new: ℹ️ No new sources need migration
